case.title: SUN MUT INS CO v. U S EX REL. HART

opinion.h4: SUN MUT INS CO v. U S EX REL. HART, (1886)
opinion.h2: SUN MUT. INS. CO. v. UNITED STATES ex rel. HART.
opinion.p: H. J. Leovy and E. D. White, for Sun Mut. Ins. Co.
The same judgment, and for like reasons, will be entered on the intervention of the Sun Mutual Insurance Company as in the case between the original parties. Affirmed.
